name: Venice
notes: Capital of the stato da màr; Arsenale / Bacino di San Marco harbour. Coordinates town-level pending harbour refinement (VMN-8).

name: Chioggia
notes: Dogado lagoon port (salt, fishing); War of Chioggia 1378–81. TYPING JUDGMENT CALL: metropolitan/domestic, not an overseas stato da màr node — review whether it belongs in this layer.

name: Parenzo
notes: Istrian commune under Venice from c.1267. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Capodistria
notes: Istrian commune under Venice from c.1279 after revolt. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Rovigno
notes: Istrian staging call, Venetian from c.1283. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Pola
notes: Submitted to Venice 1331; pre-1331 an Aquileia-aligned commune (noted, not encoded as a phase). Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Zara
notes: PHASE 1 of 2. Fourth-Crusade sack 1202 for Venice; held with repeated revolts until ceded to Hungary by the Treaty of Zadar 1358. Dates PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Zara
notes: PHASE 2 of 2. Venetian again from 1409 when Ladislaus of Naples sold his Dalmatian claim to Venice. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Sebenico
notes: Dalmatian acquisition c.1412 (some sources 1409/1412). Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Traù
notes: To Venice 1420 in the Dalmatian settlement. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Spalato
notes: To Venice 1420. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Lesina
notes: Dalmatian island staging call, to Venice 1420. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Curzola
notes: Adriatic island staging call, Venetian 1420–. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Cattaro
notes: Bocche di Cattaro; to Venice 1420. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Ragusa
notes: Independent maritime republic. Nominal Venetian suzerainty 1205–1358, then Hungarian suzerainty 1358–1526, self-governing throughout. Typed 'independent' — the suzerainties are political nuance flagged here for review.

name: Durazzo
notes: Albanian colony from 1392; lost to the Ottomans 1501. Dates PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Corfu
notes: Principal Ionian base, Venetian 1386–1797. Start date well attested; PROVISIONAL pending VMN-10.

name: Butrinto
notes: Mainland fishery and dependency of Corfu, Venetian from 1386. Date PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Lepanto
notes: Gulf of Corinth fortress, Venetian 1407–1499. Dates PROVISIONAL — verify VMN-10.

name: Cephalonia
notes: Ionian staging call under the Orsini/Tocco palatine County of Cephalonia; Venetian only from 1500. TYPING JUDGMENT CALL: non-Venetian for most of the window — included as a route staging point, review.

name: Zante
notes: Ionian staging call under the Tocco palatine county; Venetian from 1479/1482. TYPING JUDGMENT CALL: non-Venetian for most of the window — review.
